alkylation reagent: Cysteine residues were reduced with dithiothreitol and derivatized by treatment with iodoacetamide to form stable carbamidomethyl derivatives.
cleavage agent: Trypsin digestion was carried out overnight at room temperature after initial incubation at 37 °C for 2 h.
collision energy: with CID collision energy set at 35%.
enrichment method: We used Tandem Ubiquitin Binding Entities (TUBEs) pull downs to enrich for ubiquitinated NGN3 in lysates from HEK293A cells...
fragmentation method: with CID collision energy set at 35%.
instrument: the instrument was first programmed to acquire using an Orbitrap-Ion Trap method...
ionization type: The eluate ionized by electrospray ionization using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos...
labeling: To determine if USP7 plays a role in human iPSC differentiation from pancreatic progenitors to endocrine progenitors and beta cells...
reduction reagent: Cysteine residues were reduced with dithiothreitol...
